horoscope: Today's Full Moon can bring forth emotional discoveries that can lead to important ideas and ventures, dear Aries. This lunar phase may pull up an issue surrounding debts, obligations, investments, sharing, or support. If you’ve been dependent on people or things in unhealthy ways, this is the time when you’re bound to truly see and acknowledge it, motivating you to make changes and improvements. The key is to look for compromises that can lead to a new understanding of yourself or a relationship. This Full Moon also presents an opportunity to release yourself from something that has weighed you down or prevented you from growing. It’s an eye-opening or mind-expanding Full Moon. Now is the time for entertaining your needs for spiritual and emotional fulfillment, a connection to something bigger than yourself or your current projects, or to more meaningful pursuits. With a Venus-Saturn transit today, fulfilling your responsibilities or putting in some extra work can be satisfying. Friends, siblings, neighbors, or classmates can come through for you, and your practical frame of mind may be put to use and appreciated by others. There can be a serious or useful discussion that helps you move forward. It's time to get organized and prepared, or to be dutiful with your communications.

Today’s Full Moon occurs in your opposite sign, dear Taurus, reminding you to consider whether you’re living your life in a balanced way. Relationships can be in strong focus, and others may suddenly demand more of your attention! There can be epiphanies about your feelings or needs, which can be catalysts for personal change or for living your life differently. Someone could reveal something pivotal about you that leads to an all-new focus or direction. You might feel a little drained with the magnified feelings of the day, but you can also learn a lot about yourself. Your relationship needs are awakening, and revelations about a relationship or your emotions can lead to exciting changes. This is a time to learn what you need and want from others, and it can mark a turning point. Today's Venus-Saturn aspect is a strengthening factor that favors taking care of duties and responsibilities. In fact, you may take pleasure in your accomplishments. Getting your financial affairs in order can have a positive impact across the board. It's a time to appreciate simple pleasures and comforts rather than give in to the feeling that you need more to be happy. You feel better if you take a moderate approach now.

With today's Full Moon, dear Gemini, if you've been unsatisfied with work, health, or service matters, you're now feeling this frustration in a rush. It can motivate you to make changes to your routine that help you feel better about yourself. For best results, try not to worry about whether or not you're appreciated, and instead answer to yourself. You can have an epiphany about the work or chores you do, or how you go about fulfilling your needs and taking care of yourself. If you've been spending a lot of time attending to the world of emotions, then this can be a time when the practical world demands your attention. There can be a strong realization that serves as a turning point. This Full Moon might bring on a scurry of activity as you attempt to get more organized. Today's Venus-Saturn transit helps you see a plan or friendship more clearly. Friends have something important to contribute right now. You're radiating appealing, quiet magnetism. People tend to value you, more so than usual.

Today's Full Moon illuminates your sector of joy, dear Cancer, encouraging you to indulge your feelings, share your creations, and follow your bliss. There can be pivotal discoveries of your feelings for someone or a special project. A friendship can reach a turning point, or your emotions are overflowing. You might release pent-up feelings or come to important emotional revelations about people in your life and your need for them. You could also recognize your place in a group, with friends, or in the community. The need to more fully express your joy, love, or affection and creativity is in focus now. While this is an important process, it's a good idea to take some time to reflect on what you're feeling before making bigger decisions. You can also feel a strong need to channel your energies into something meaningful or productive. With Venus and Saturn working in harmony today, you have an increased love of order, organization, and clarity. It's an ideal time to take care of business and connect with others in practical ways. Attending to a responsibility towards an important person in your life is possible now, and it can be more comfortable than usual or perhaps quite pleasurable to do so.

While you've been paying more and more attention to your responsibilities to the outside world, long-term goals, or ambitions these days, dear Leo, attention now turns to your personal time, inner world, and home life. Today's Full Moon illuminates your feelings about home, family, safety, and belonging. It can signal a turning point regarding your living conditions or stir strong emotions about how you want to live. This lunation reminds you of the need for nurture, comfort, centering, and downtime. A better balance between taking the lead and allowing yourself to recuperate and relax seems vital. A home, family, or property matter could grab your strong attention at this time. Your idealistic side is fully engaged today, but a harmonious aspect between Venus and Saturn helps you enjoy a steadier pace. A relationship with a friend can stabilize in pleasing ways, and you can feel that others are coming through and are reliable. You not only have the necessary energy, but the foresight and patience, to make significant headway in your projects, work, or ventures. Your vision is practical, and what has long-term value is most appealing to you.

Today's Full Moon can awaken you to both ideas and feelings that are pivotal, dear Virgo. You become aware of previously buried needs and desires, which can be eye-opening. This Full Moon occurs in your communications sector, perhaps prompting a conversation that stirs up all sorts of emotions or a sudden new interest that excites you. Through this, you recognize the need to improve the management of your daily affairs. You value staying on top of things, keeping in touch with people, and opening lines of communication. You might have an epiphany about a personal interest, a study, or a project, and your real, raw feelings emerge. You may need to meet a deadline or deal with everyday nuisances that you've let slide. Still, this Full Moon can be about your attitude and viewpoint. A new, positive, empowering way of approaching yourself and others can emerge from realizations happening now. Today's Venus-Saturn connection favors the discussion of practical matters and plans for the future. It also boosts your judgment of worthwhile projects or investments.

Today's Full Moon can help you clarify a financial position or business matter, dear Libra. Instead, it could prompt a sudden realization of what you need and how to go about getting it. Now is a good time for realizations and discoveries that set you on a path towards increased independence, security, and maturity. With the events of this week, you want to be on top of things rather than feel at someone's mercy. It's a time for being bold about taking care of yourself and your needs. This Full Moon is about recognizing your feelings and doing something constructive with them. As you advance, aim to direct your energy toward areas of your life that require change and updates. Today's Venus-Saturn transit is supportive and steadying. While there may be some reserve in your relationships and connections, there can be an excellent feeling of constancy. Attention to strengthening projects and relationships can have long-term benefits. It's a good time to dedicate yourself to a project or activity that requires your strong attention.

The Moon spends the day in your sign, and it turns full, dear Scorpio. The Full Moon in Scorpio is a time for fresh, new approaches, particularly in your relationships, but also with self-care and your needs for nurture. If you've been unhappy with some element of your life, now is the time when you feel the motivation to make it better! A Full Moon points to a release of some sort, and it's important to let something out, divulge, emote, and express those things you've kept to yourself and now need to liberate so that you can grow, blossom, and improve. There can be a revelation about a relationship or your feelings for someone. It's a time to awaken to emotions that you may have ignored or brushed aside in previous weeks, and it's exciting. Your feelings are in full bloom, and the coming week is excellent for sorting them out. For now, enjoy the moment and the unique window into your inner workings, needs, and feelings. Today's Venus-Saturn transit is strong for realistically assessing matters related to your health, work, or financial matters. You can more clearly see what needs to be improved or changed, and making adjustments comes with few, if any, regrets. A work or health matter may gain traction or clarity. You're reasoning things out and attending to details now. Details serve you well today as you remember important things or fill in some blanks. You're in great shape for making plans and lists, editing, refining, and discussing things. In your relationships, showing affection through loyalty and reliability is well-supported.

With the Full Moon occurring in the sign just behind yours today, dear Sagittarius, this is a time when your psychic radar is working overtime. You can have an epiphany about your true feelings on a matter or about your instincts regarding a person or project. A secret may come to light, or you may recognize a feeling that you've kept at bay, making the discovery a personal one. If you've been spending a lot of time attending to your physical needs and the material world, this is a compelling time for emotional and psychic release or escape so you can recuperate, rest, and rejuvenate. It's time to bring back a better balance to your life regarding attention to both physical and emotional health. It can be important to take a light schedule now if this is possible. Even so, you're in excellent shape for meeting your responsibilities and obligations, especially to others, which comes naturally and easily to you today, and you're doing so with style and grace. You can be motivated to do right by someone or to offer help or support as Venus and Saturn form a harmonious aspect. There is a strong tendency to show your appreciation or affection through practical gestures — actions weigh more than words. You can enjoy making plans and designs now.

Today's Full Moon amplifies your emotions related to friendship, community, and your social life, dear Capricorn. If you've been taking a lot of personal time, you may now need to pull yourself out of your projects and connect. You might see opportunities to share your load or collaborate. It's best to observe, absorb, and avoid reacting until you've processed new information and feelings. You can be in demand, or you might experience a personal revelation or a surprising discovery in your social life. It's time to remind yourself that you're not alone! Aim to harness the power of any revelation occurring now to set goals and make plans. Today's harmonious aspect between Venus and Saturn is beneficial and, fortunately, holds more power as it occurs so close to this Full Moon. It supports practical improvements around the home, in the family dynamic, in your work, or with your health, especially. You might pick up a new skill or make progress on a home or work project. You see the value of traditions and routines more than usual. Security now and down the road is something that you're becoming more and more invested in, and today, you're especially enjoying activities that help secure your future.

Inspiration comes from the information coming into your world today, dear Aquarius. Today's Full Moon occurs in your solar tenth house, and a clearer vision of where you'd like to head in the future is forming. What you learn now, whether this is new information or discovering your true feelings about a matter, helps you make better choices and plans. Still, it's best to take it all in for a few days. You may need to take the lead or deal with a responsibility or project that requires focus. Others might recognize you for your talents, trustworthiness, or experience. There can be a job opportunity, an award, or a "next step" moment that clarifies your general life direction. If creative flow has been a little inconsistent lately, you can get the shot in the arm you need now to get the enthusiasm back. Fortunately, a harmonious aspect between Venus and Saturn today is cautious but supportive, bringing some steadiness into your world that's most welcome now. You may be attending to practical details that help improve or secure relationships and projects. You can feel especially appreciated, and this helps motivate you further. There can be more to do than usual, but a particular enjoyment of filling your responsibilities and a sense of being "on track." You may gain an advantage in a financial or business matter.

There can be something published, expressed, or promoted that helps you turn a corner now, dear Pisces. Today's Full Moon lights up your sector of spirit, adventure, and expression, and there can be unexpected discoveries and realizations related to learning, sharing, and beliefs or ideas. If you've been focused on routines lately, the desire to escape your regular daily life is insistent now. You no longer want to ignore your needs for broader learning or experience. You're arriving at a turning point or a revelation about communications, knowledge, attitude, or outlook. Someone's perspective or news can stir a new way of thinking and a strong desire to live your life differently, with a new attitude. With today's Venus-Saturn transit, you might enjoy dedicating yourself to something special, whether it's a project, plan, or relationship. You can find it easier than usual to enjoy duties or tasks when you focus on their long-term benefits. The day favors a moderate approach, and this applies to practical matters as well as relationship and emotional affairs.
